name: king_county_permit_status
description: Look up building permit history and status for any King County, WA property. Accepts a street address, 10-digit parcel number, or permit number. Searches MyBuildingPermit.com (14 cities + King County), Bellevue Open Data, Renton EnerGov (live API), and WA State L&I (electrical permits). Returns all matching permits sorted newest-first. Use for due diligence, permit tracking, or verifying contractor pull history.

query.description: One of: street address ('1817 Morris Ave S, Renton WA 98055'), 10-digit parcel number ('7222000353'), or permit number ('B25000947', 'ADDC21-0275', '23-127651-LP'). Input type is auto-detected.

action.description: found — permits[] is populated; none — no permits found; refine — connection issue, retry; reject — bad input

permits.description: Permit records sorted newest applied_date first.

status.description: e.g. Issued, Complete, On Hold, Withdrawn, Expired

portal.description: Source permit or portal URL when available

separate_portal.description: Present when the city has its own portal not yet searchable. Includes city, portal URL, note.

errors.description: Source errors when a search is incomplete; may accompany permits from sources that succeeded.

exit_codes.1: action=none or refine — no permits or connection issue
